Quarterly Report

Item 1. Financial Statements

Condensed consolidated balance sheets, statements of operations, and notes accompany the quarterly report.

Item 2. Management's Discussion and Analysis

Management discusses client demand, data center growth, and inventory changes in the quarter.

Item 1A. Risk Factors

Supply chain constraints and pricing competition remain meaningful risk factors for the business.

Item 3. Legal Proceedings

The company summarizes material legal matters and related exposures where appropriate.

Item 4. Controls and Procedures

Disclosure controls were evaluated as of the quarter end date.
